vocab.meaning: trang web tổng hợp tin tức/dữ liệu
vocab.example: I frequently browse news aggregator sites to get a comprehensive overview of global affairs from various sources.
Wikipedia is my go-to repository of knowledge whenever I need to verify a historical fact quickly.

vocab.meaning: giao diện thân thiện với người dùng
vocab.example: I am drawn to e-commerce platforms that boast a user-friendly interface and seamless navigation.

vocab.meaning: diễn đàn chuyên biệt (về một lĩnh vực cụ thể)
vocab.example: I often participate in niche forums dedicated to vintage photography to exchange tips with fellow enthusiasts.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa/hợp lý hóa quy trình làm việc
vocab.example: I regularly use cloud-based productivity tools to streamline my workflow and manage my daily tasks more efficiently.

vocab.meaning: nội dung đa phương tiện (hình ảnh, video, âm thanh)
vocab.example: Social media sites are perfect for consuming engaging multimedia content during my lunch breaks.

vocab.meaning: cập nhật/nắm bắt kịp thời (thông tin, xu hướng)
vocab.example: I visit tech blogs daily to stay abreast of the latest advancements in artificial intelligence.
As a student, I spend a significant amount of time accessing scholarly journals through my university's library portal.

vocab.meaning: nội dung được chọn lọc kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: I prefer websites that offer curated content tailored to my specific interests in architecture and design.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng học tập trực tuyến
vocab.example: In my spare time, I frequent e-learning platforms to pick up new skills like coding or digital marketing.
